summary: Iteration 34: Comprehensive testing of billing history timeline feature. All backend APIs and frontend components working correctly. GET /api/billing/history returns timeline items with correct structure. Frontend BillingHistoryTimeline component renders properly with populated list, refresh button works.
passed_tests: GET /api/billing/history - Items have required fields (id, title, description, occurred_at, actor_label, actor_type, tone)
GET /api/billing/history - tone values are valid (success, warning, info)
GET /api/billing/history - actor_type values are valid (system, user)
GET /api/billing/subscription - Has required fields (tenant_id, plan, interval, status, portal_available, can_cancel, can_change_plan)
Frontend: Timeline shows populated list with 20+ items
Frontend: Timeline items show correct tone colors (green=success, amber=warning, blue=info)
Frontend: Timeline items show dates in Turkish format (e.g. '09 Mart 2026 08:33')
Frontend: Timeline items show actor labels (user email or 'Sistem')
Frontend: Existing billing management card still works
Frontend: Existing plan change card still works
critical_code_review_comments: SUCCESS: billing_history_service.py correctly queries audit_logs with scope='billing' and maps events to user-facing timeline items
SUCCESS: BillingHistoryTimeline.jsx handles all states (loading, error, empty, populated)
SUCCESS: Turkish localization correct for all UI elements
SUCCESS: Timeline tone colors properly indicate event severity
SUCCESS: Refresh button triggers loadHistory callback correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing history timeline feature complete and working. The timeline shows events from audit_logs collection filtered by scope='billing'. Actions tracked include: billing.checkout_completed, billing.plan_changed_now, billing.plan_change_scheduled, billing.subscription_cancel_scheduled, billing.subscription_reactivated, subscription.invoice_paid, subscription.payment_failed, subscription.canceled. Each event has Turkish title, description, date, actor label, and tone-based color coding.

feature_validation_summary.GET /api/billing/history: PASS - Returns timeline items with all required fields
feature_validation_summary.Faturalama Geçmişi card: PASS - Renders with title, description, refresh button
feature_validation_summary.Timeline populated state: PASS - Shows list of billing events with correct formatting
feature_validation_summary.Existing billing overview: PASS - Summary cards and management area still work
